args: ENV_FILE="$HOME/welgo/.env"; if [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then set -a; . "$ENV_FILE"; set +a; fi; export WELGO_BRAIN_URL="${WELGO_BRAIN_URL:-https://mac-mini-brain.tail59326c.ts.net}"; export MCP_BEARER_TOKEN="${MCP_BEARER_TOKEN:-tailnet-identity-resolves-server-side}"; exec node $HOME/welgo/welgo-brain-remote-mcp.js
